articles.title: F1 Australian GP: Weather forecast, schedule and how to watch - Motorsport.com
articles.description: Everything you need to know about the 2026 F1 Australian Grand Prix – including weather forecast, television info and schedule
articles.content:
It seemed like Formula 1 was only away for five minutes, because its 2026 campaign starts this weekend with the Australian Grand Prix to kickstart a new era for the championship.
